description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the eclipse-temurin:11-jdk Docker image, defining variables ANDROID_BUILD_TOOLS=30.0.3, ANDROID_COMPILE_SDK=31, ANDROID_SDK_TOOLS=7583922. Include a before_script that runs apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y wget tar unzip lib32stdc++6 lib32z1, sets ANDROID_SDK_ROOT to ${PWD}/android-home, creates the cmdline-tools directory, downloads the Android command‑line tools zip with wget using the ANDROID_SDK_TOOLS variable, unzips it, moves the tools folder, adds its bin to PATH, runs sdkmanager --verbose --version, accepts licenses with yes | sdkmanager --licenses, installs platforms;android-${ANDROID_COMPILE_SDK}, platform-tools and build-tools;${ANDROID_BUILD_TOOLS}, and makes ./gradlew executable. Define a single build stage with an interruptible assembleDebug job that runs ./gradlew assembleDebug.
